loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy and reactive energy for the last hour; SEC, subsidy limits, and progress percentages are omitted as they require commercial/production data not measured by this transformer meter.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power trends over the last hour; rated and contracted power constants are omitted as the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power as HV Input and total apparent power as LV Output; loss and efficiency are derived from active power. 'Loss Pct of Input' is omitted as no dedicated loss-ratio column exists for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing actual load and load factor — expected load, range, and anomaly events are not measured by this meter.
